note: Per-bloc PER-VARIABLE OWN-TREND trend-cycle model (generalized from the gated-GO US pilot us_tvar_export_pervar.m). EVERY observable y_i = own stochastic trend (LLT log-drift / anchored-AR(1) RW rate-level) + stationary cycle. NO broadcast g*/pi* classification. STEP1' per-column univariate DK smoothers; STEP2 per-variable detrend (+constDetrend for stationary); STEP3 full-panel noc=0 deviation-from-trend cycle (enforceStationary). LIVE star-augmented panel. obs_spec_ids track the POLICY rate so EFFI + rate slider re-anchor correctly.

default_anchors.note: STRUCTURAL long-run targets the DEFAULT baseline reverts toward (slider re-anchors). Per-country, display units, ordered as observables.
